examples: Other stools throughout have an artificial blue and purple terrazzo surface applied.
A zigzagging path of white terrazzo carves its way through the leftover space as the main circulation.
The floors are original terrazzo that have a hint of pink in them, so I played it up with a very light pink wall.
Cadets, you distinguished yourselves as leaders before you ever stepped foot on the Terrazzo.
The living and dining area is walls of glass that contrast against lava rock walls and gray terrazzo floors.
